steps.title: Check withdrawal status in finance tab
steps.notes: Open withdrawal request details and evaluate current state.

steps.title: Is withdrawal pending longer than 3 business days?
steps.notes: If yes, acknowledge delay and provide escalation guidance.

steps.title: Bank settlement may take 3-5 business days
steps.notes: Inform user that completion in cashier does not guarantee immediate bank posting.

steps.title: ARN required after long complete-state delay
steps.notes: Escalate to finance for ARN when completion exceeds expected timeframe.
